tasks.q3: Can I 추가 my own tasks?
tasks.a2: Tap on a task to view its details and requirements. Once completed, tap "Mark Complete" and 추가 any 필수 photos or notes for verification.
tasks.q2: How do I complete a task?
tasks.q1: How do I view my assigned tasks?
tasks.a3: 예! Tap the "+" button in the Tasks tab to create a personal task. You can set reminders, priority levels, and due dates for your own to-do items.
tasks.a1: Open the Tasks tab to see 모두 your pending, in-progress, and completed tasks. Tasks are sorted by priority and due date.

gettingStarted.a3: Go to Profile > Settings > Notifications to customize which alerts you receive. We recommend enabling shift reminders and schedule change notifications.
gettingStarted.q2: How do I navigate the app?
gettingStarted.q1: How do I set up my profile?
gettingStarted.a2: Use the bottom navigation bar to switch between Home, Schedule, Tasks, and Profile. The Home screen shows your daily overview, upcoming shifts, and quick actions.
gettingStarted.a1: Go to the Profile tab and tap on any field to 편집 your information. You can 추가 your photo, update contact details, and set your availability preferences.

career.a1: Go to Career from the Home screen to see your current role, skills progress, and available advancement paths. Complete training modules to unlock new opportunities.
career.a2: Certifications are earned by completing specific training modules and skill assessments. Check the Skills tab to see available certifications and your progress.
career.a3: Open job postings from the Career section. If you meet the requirements, tap "Apply" and 제출 your application. Your manager will be notified.
career.q3: How do I apply for internal positions?
career.q1: How do I track my career progress?

timeTracking.q1: How do I clock in and out?
timeTracking.q2: What if I forget to clock out?
timeTracking.a2: Contact your manager as soon as possible. They can manually adjust your time records. You can also 추가 a note explaining the missed clock-out in the Schedule tab.
timeTracking.a3: Your hours are calculated from clock-in to clock-out, minus any scheduled breaks. Overtime is automatically tracked based on your contract and local labor laws.
timeTracking.a1: On your shift day, the Clock In button appears on the Home screen. Tap it when you arrive at work. The button changes to Clock Out when your shift is active.

schedule.a3: From the Schedule tab, tap the "+" button and select "Request Time Off". Choose your dates, 추가 a reason, and 제출. Your manager will review and approve or deny the request.
schedule.q1: How do I view my upcoming shifts?
schedule.a1: Open the Schedule tab to see your weekly schedule. Tap on any shift to view details including location, role, and any special instructions.
schedule.a2: Tap on the shift you want to swap, then select "Request Swap". Choose an available colleague and 제출 the request. You'll be notified when they respond.
schedule.q3: How do I request time off?
schedule.q2: How do I request a shift swap?

rewards.q2: How do I redeem my rewards?
rewards.a1: Earn points by completing tasks on time, maintaining good attendance, receiving recognition, and achieving performance goals. Points are awarded automatically.
rewards.q1: How do I earn momentum points?
rewards.a3: Points remain valid for 12 months from the date earned. Check your Rewards history to see when points were earned and their expiration dates.
rewards.a2: Go to the Rewards section to browse available rewards. Tap on any item to see the point cost, then tap "Redeem" if you have enough points.
